package repository

import "context"

// MenusRepository is a draft repository boundary for menus.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type MenusRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query MenusQuery) ([]Menu, error)
}

type MenusQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
